# Stakeholder Requirements — BMS-Lite Project

Customer: HypotheticalCar Corp · Product line: Battery Monitoring System (Lite)

This requirement elicitation captures stakeholder expectations for the
BMS-Lite ECU. Produced by SYS.1 Requirements Elicitation.

- STK-001: The BMS-Lite shall report pack state-of-charge to the vehicle
  network every 100 ms (approved).
- STK-002: The BMS-Lite shall operate reliably between -40°C and +85°C
  ambient temperature (approved).
- STK-003: The BMS-Lite shall raise a warning within 2 seconds of detecting
  an over-temperature condition on any cell (approved).
- STK-004: The supplier shall provide a diagnostic interface compatible
  with UDS ISO 14229 (approved).

All requirements have been agreed with the customer and traced to the
project kickoff minutes on 2026-02-14.
